clusters.title: Thieves ram ute into shopping centre, steal ATM in wild CCTV footage
clusters.neutral_headline: Thieves ram ute into shopping centre, steal ATM in CCTV footage

items.title: Thieves ram ute into shopping centre, steal ATM in wild CCTV footage
items.standfirst: T he incident occurred in the dead of night at a shopping centre in WA .
items.content: Cameras have caught the moment thieves rammed a ute through the doors of a shopping centre and stole an ATM in the dead of night.The incident occurred at a shopping centre in Baldivis, south of Perth, on March 19.CCTV footage shows a blue Nissan ute backing through the centre's glass doors and into an empty hallway at around 2am.READ MORE: Son locked his dementia-suffering father in blacked-out room to steal his fortuneThe vehicle then continues to reverse, hitting an ATM which topples to the ground.Two masked offenders can be seen entering the building through the broken doors and moving to the back of the ute.Another offender is visible in the ute's drivers' seat.The vehicle is then seen driving out of the shopping centre with a chain attached to the ATM, dragging it along behind the ute.READ MORE: Musicians back out of Trump's Washington concert after widespread criticism Police found the vehicle burnt out three days later, on March 21.It was located in East Rockingham, about a 15 minute drive from the shopping centre on Amazon Drive where the incident took place.Detectives are now calling on anyone with any further CCTV, dash-cam, or mobile phone vision of the vehicle or other information relating to the incident to come forward.Anyone with footage can upload it to them directly online.Members of the public can also contact Crime Stoppers via the website or by calling 1800 333 000.

items.title: Thieves make off with ATM after ramming ute into shopping centre
items.standfirst: Wild footage shows the moment a ute smashes through the glass shopping centre doors before masked offenders steal an ATM.
items.content: Wild footage shows the moment a ute smashes through the glass shopping centre doors before masked offenders steal an ATM.
